details.safeProbe: Use the parity request against gid://shopify/Order/0 first so Shopify returns validation/userErrors without creating payment history.
details.localStagingCandidate: Can be locally staged after fixture-backed semantics by recording a local manual payment transaction and derived financial-status changes.

notes: Planned manual-payment parity for `orderCreateManualPayment`. This root is not locally supported yet; it remains an explicit unsupported passthrough registry entry until manual payment payload and downstream order status semantics are captured.
